name: ReplyRate - Save jobs & prep for UK interviews
description: Save jobs from LinkedIn, Indeed, and Lever to your ReplyRate dashboard. Check UK visa sponsorship, generate tailored CVs and cover letters, practice live mock interviews.
_comment_oauth2: BEFORE LOADING THIS EXTENSION: replace __SET_BEFORE_LOAD__ in oauth2.client_id with a real Google OAuth Client ID. To create one: Google Cloud Console -> APIs & Services -> Credentials -> Create Credentials -> OAuth client ID -> Application type: Chrome App -> Application ID: paste the stable extension id shown at chrome://extensions while this extension is load-unpacked. The created client_id ends in .apps.googleusercontent.com. The Firebase project (inboxiq-371b7) must also have Google enabled as a sign-in provider in Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Sign-in method. The _comment_oauth2 field is ignored by Chrome (underscore-prefixed top-level keys are convention for manifest comments).
